titleStmt.title: SII 18.279: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 279. (B.K. No. 170 of 1932-33.) SAṄGŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in the temple of Vīrabhadra.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Vīrapratāpa Dēvarāya-Mahārāya and is dated in Śaka 1334, Nandana, Chaitra śu. 1, Sōmavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1412, March 13. The week-day, however, was Sunday and not Monday as cited in the record.

It states that when Sāvaṇṇa-Oḍeya (son of) Pradhānadaṇḍanātha Nāgaṁṇa-Daṇḍanāyaka was governing the Gōve region, Nēmaṇṇa and his brothers made a grant of land as nettaru-goḍage to Siṅgenāyaka, Lakhenāyaka and others. Pāḍimukhi Jaina Mallappa is stated to be the grandson of Baichaveggaḍe who was the Kāvamūli of Saṅgūr, situated in the Kaṁpaṇa of Gutti Eighteen. The genealogy of Nēmaṇṇa is given.

In another inscription from Saṁgūr belonging to the reign of Dēvarāya, a certain Baichaveggaḍe is found mentioned as the minister of Kaṁpilarāya. (Ep. Ind., Vol. XXIII, p. 185; No. 278 above). But the pedigree given there does not agree with the one found in the present record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhaṁmūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīphrithvīvallabha Asvapati gajapati narapatitiri
Īrāyā mūla rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpadēvarāya mahā
rāyaru sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyutirppa kāladoḷu [Anādhāra] pradhānadaṁḍa
nātha nāgaṁṇadaṁṇāyakavoḍeyara sāvaṁṇavoḍeyaru gōveya rājyādhi patigaḷā
gi bhōgisuva kāladoḷu guttihadineṁṭu kaṁpaṇake voḷagāda saṁgūra kāvamūli baicaveggaḍe
ya moṁmakkaḷu beḷuvalāditya tuḷuvarāyanā sthāpanācāryya vairinaranārasiṁha kaṁdhāratriThis letter is
ṇētragōveya pāḍimukhi jaina mallappagaḷa kumāra sāvaṁṇagaḷa kumāra sēmaṁṇa mādarasa haṁ
paṁṇagaḷu taṁma voḍauṭṭida sāvaṁṇavoḍeyara bīyaga talatalāṭakke kuṁti mādu va nāyakkara [gau�]Mistake fordha
ṁḍavāḍageṟegeya būcenāyaka sādu rēcenāyakara moṁmakkaḷu mēḷige dēva nāyakara kumāraru Ā saṁ
gūra nāyakaru siṁgenāyka lakhenāyakka mallenāyaka bairenāyakarige naṁma dānamūlada saṁgūralu
naṁma vrittikṣētrakke lēsu kolleyakke Ā siṁgenāyka lakhenāyaka mallenāyka bairenāykaru naṁma
hage muṁtāgi Ellavakke hiṁde vodagidarāgi naṁma dānamūlyavāgi Ā saṁgora pāḍimukhi
nēmaṁṇagaḷu mādarasa haṁpaṁṇa sirigiridēvavoḍeyaru gauḍugaḷu kaṁnagoṁḍa gauḍara boṁmaṁ
ṇagaḷu paṭṭaṇasvāmi malliseṭṭi keṁmiseṭṭi tipparāsiya kallappa goṇasabāya dēvaṁṇa reṁmagoṁ
ḍa liṁgagoṁḍa baiciseṭṭiya dēvaṁṇa mākiseṭṭiya nāgappa rāceseṭṭiya caṁdappa saṁgoṁḍana bāgoṁ
ḍa kaṭṭigeya sātappa pośalli ya bīragoṁḍa maḷigeya lakkiseṭṭiya maga bōyiseṭṭi nārappana bai
reseṭṭi bokkasada lakkiseṭṭi lōkaveggaḍeya moṁmagatayiseṭṭi ceṁnavarada rāmi seṭṭiya maga
Ādiseṭṭi sēnabōva kēmaṁṇagaḷa maga sōvappa kuṁbāṟa maṁgiseṭṭi gāṇada kaliseṭi paṭṭesāli
ga narasigoṁḍana maga nāgappa paṭṭesāliga sōmagoṁḍana maga kallappa paṭṭesāliga vīrappa paṭṭe
sāliga buguḍiya nāgappa purusabōva bārika nāgabōva kaṁmāṟa mallōjana maga kallōja baḍagi nāgō
ja Akkasāle sātōja maḍivāḷa kētidēva nāpita nāgōja Ūrataḷavāṟa rāmaṇa mādāṟa buḷḷa
sahavāgi siṁgenāyka lakhenāyka mallenāyka bhairanāykarige nettarugoḍugeyāgi koṭṭa keyyi
Ā saṁgūra baḍagadeseya dikkina varadānadiya Aḍi modalāgi mūḍaṇadeseya he� sa Ūra sīme
ya kallādi teṁkadeseya nāgaru naṭṭa kallu modalāgi baḍagaṇa beṁceyahaḷḷaya vottu Ādiyā
gi caturāghāḍadalu kalla naḍisi śakavaruṣa 1334 neya naṁdanasaṁvatsarada cayitra su 1 sōma
vāradalu Ā siṁgenāyaka lakhenāyka mallenāyka bhairenāykara makkaḷu makkaḷu paryaṁta [Ā] raktageyya mā
ḍisikoṁḍu sukhadiṁ bhōgisuvaru © yidakke Āvanōrvvanaḷupidaḍe tāyali hatu taṁde
yali haṁnoṁdu mātāpitrugaḷanu svarggadaliddavara narakadalikkida samānakke hōharu
vāraṇāsiyali 700 ṟu kavileyanū 100 maṁdi tapasvigaḷa koṁda pāpakke hōharu
yidū Allade Āvanōrvvanū tappidavana Apamānava [Ā] Ūra mādāṟa Āyyaba ḷḷu gaṁge koṭṭa
nu yi raktageyivritti kṣētravanu Āvanōrvvanū pālisivātanu voṁdu lakṣa kapileya vāraṇāsiya
li biṭṭa phalakke hōharu .
Digital edition of SII 18.279 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
